name: DDACS
description: Code, quick-start examples and full documentation: https://github.com/BaumSebastian/DDACS. The benchmark dataset was generated through a comprehensive simulation study of the deep drawing process for DP600 sheet metal, incorporating variations in geometry, material properties, and process parameters. The simulations were based on modified quadratic cups with a length of 210 mm and a drawing depth of 30 mm. Three distinct base geometries (Concave, Convex, and Rectangular) were derived from a rectangular reference shape, with the geometric parameters (curvature radius, bottom radius, wall angle) varied at their minimum and maximum corner values. For each geometry corner, the material and process parameters (material scaling factor, friction coefficient, sheet metal thickness, blank holder force) were systematically varied across their full Cartesian product, yielding approximately 32,000 unique simulations. Each simulation captures the forming operation (OP10) and a subsequent cutting operation (OP20), with stress, strain, thickness, and nodal displacement fields at multiple timesteps including the configuration after springback. Each HDF5 file carries named scalar root attributes (geometry, curvature_radius, material_scaling_factor, friction_coefficient, sheet_metal_thickness, blank holder force, etc.) matching the columns of process_parameters.csv. This CSV is the central index mapping every simulation to its parameters and a recommended ML train, test and val split. A single simulation file (258864.zip) is provided for fast preview without downloading the full corner packages. The dataset also includes a complementary RDDAC study covering intermediate geometric and process parameter combinations. The HDF5 files use gzip and shuffle compression for compact downloads while remaining readable by standard tooling (h5py, MATLAB HDF5, Julia HDF5). The structured layout supports surrogate modeling, springback prediction, and machine learning benchmarks for sheet metal forming. The simulation provenance fields (program, tool deformability, model symmetries, material model, meshing, contact, etc.) follow the SIM-KAx schema (Schumann et al., Production Engineering, 2026) for cross-institution interoperability of forming-simulation datasets.
citation: P. Heinzelmann, S. Baum, K. R. Riedmüller, M. Liewald, M. Weyrich, A comprehensive benchmark dataset for sheet metal forming: Advancing machine learning and surrogate modelling in pro-cess simulations, MATEC Web of Conferences 408 (2025) 01090.
citeAs: P. Heinzelmann, S. Baum, K. R. Riedmüller, M. Liewald, M. Weyrich, A comprehensive benchmark dataset for sheet metal forming: Advancing machine learning and surrogate modelling in pro-cess simulations, MATEC Web of Conferences 408 (2025) 01090.

recordSet.name: process_parameters
recordSet.description: Per-simulation parameter row from process_parameters.csv. Use `index` to look up the matching HDF5 file.

field.name: index
field.description: Unique simulation identifier; matches the HDF5 filename (e.g. index=16039 -> 16039.h5).

field.name: geometry
field.description: Base part geometry. One of 'rectangular', 'concave', 'convex'.

field.name: curvature_radius
field.description: Geometry-specific curvature / corner radius, in mm.

field.name: bottom_radius
field.description: Bottom radius of the formed cup, in mm.

field.name: wall_angle
field.description: Wall angle of the formed cup, in degrees.

field.name: material_scaling_factor
field.description: Scaling factor on the base DP600 flow curve (1.0 = nominal). Dimensionless.

field.name: sheet_metal_thickness
field.description: Initial blank sheet thickness (SHTK), in mm.

field.name: friction_coefficient
field.description: Coulomb friction coefficient between blank and tools (FC). Dimensionless.

field.name: blankholder_force
field.description: Force applied by the blank holder (BF), in Newtons.

field.name: split
field.description: Recommended ML data split: 'train' (~80%), 'test' (~10%), 'val' (~10%); deterministic, seed=42.

field.name: rddac
field.description: True if the simulation belongs to the RDDAC sub-study (otherwise part of the corner blocks).

recordSet.name: field-map
recordSet.description: Every HDF5 dataset declared once. Each entry's description encodes the on-disk path, whether the field is time-varying, and the full on-disk shape. Use-case RecordSets reference entries here.

field.name: op10_binder_element_shell_ids
field.description: OP10 / binder. Unique integer identifiers for each shell element. HDF5 path: OP10/binder/element_shell_ids. Dimensions: (elements) = (134). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_binder_element_shell_node_indexes
field.description: OP10 / binder. Local node indices of the 4 corners of each quadrilateral element. HDF5 path: OP10/binder/element_shell_node_indexes. Dimensions: (elements, quad_corners) = (134, 4). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_binder_element_shell_part_indexes
field.description: OP10 / binder. Part membership label for each element (0..3 over die/punch/binder/blank). HDF5 path: OP10/binder/element_shell_part_indexes. Dimensions: (elements) = (134). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_binder_node_acceleration
field.description: OP10 / binder. Acceleration vectors of nodes. Unit: mm/s^2. HDF5 path: OP10/binder/node_acceleration. Dimensions: (timesteps, nodes, xyz) = (3, 146, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_binder_node_coordinates
field.description: OP10 / binder. Initial XYZ positions of nodes. Unit: mm. HDF5 path: OP10/binder/node_coordinates. Dimensions: (nodes, xyz) = (146, 3). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_binder_node_displacement
field.description: OP10 / binder. Displacement vectors from initial position, per node, per timestep. Unit: mm. HDF5 path: OP10/binder/node_displacement. Dimensions: (timesteps, nodes, xyz) = (3, 146, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_binder_node_ids
field.description: OP10 / binder. Unique integer identifiers for each node point. HDF5 path: OP10/binder/node_ids. Dimensions: (nodes) = (146). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_binder_node_velocity
field.description: OP10 / binder. Velocity vectors of nodes. Unit: mm/s. HDF5 path: OP10/binder/node_velocity. Dimensions: (timesteps, nodes, xyz) = (3, 146, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_bending_moment
field.description: OP10 / blank. Bending moment components (Mxx, Myy, Mxy) per element. Unit: N*mm. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_bending_moment. Dimensions: (timesteps, elements, moment_components) = (3, 11025, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_effective_plastic_strain
field.description: OP10 / blank. Effective plastic strain at 3 layers per element. Unit: -. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_effective_plastic_strain. Dimensions: (timesteps, elements, layers) = (4, 11025, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_effective_plastic_strain_all_ipt
field.description: OP10 / blank. Effective plastic strain at all 7 integration points per element. Unit: -. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_effective_plastic_strain_all_ipt. Dimensions: (elements, integration_points) = (11025, 7). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_ids
field.description: OP10 / blank. Unique integer identifiers for each shell element. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_ids. Dimensions: (elements) = (11025). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_internal_energy
field.description: OP10 / blank. Internal energy stored in each element. Unit: mJ. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_internal_energy. Dimensions: (timesteps, elements) = (3, 11025). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_node_ids
field.description: OP10 / blank. Global node IDs of the 4 corners of each quadrilateral element. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_node_ids. Dimensions: (elements, quad_corners) = (11025, 4). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_node_indexes
field.description: OP10 / blank. Local node indices of the 4 corners of each quadrilateral element. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_node_indexes. Dimensions: (elements, quad_corners) = (11025, 4). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_normal_force
field.description: OP10 / blank. In-plane normal force components (Nxx, Nyy, Nxy) per element. Unit: N. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_normal_force. Dimensions: (timesteps, elements, force_components) = (3, 11025, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_part_indexes
field.description: OP10 / blank. Part membership label for each element (0..3 over die/punch/binder/blank). HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_part_indexes. Dimensions: (elements) = (11025). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_shear_force
field.description: OP10 / blank. Transverse shear force components (Qxz, Qyz) per element. Unit: N. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_shear_force. Dimensions: (timesteps, elements, shear_components) = (3, 11025, 2). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_strain
field.description: OP10 / blank. Strain tensor (6 components) per element, at top and bottom layer. Unit: -. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_strain. Dimensions: (timesteps, elements, layers, strain_components) = (4, 11025, 2, 6). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_stress
field.description: OP10 / blank. Cauchy stress tensor (6 components: sxx, syy, szz, sxy, syz, szx) per element, evaluated at 3 through-thickness layers. Unit: Pa. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_stress. Dimensions: (timesteps, elements, layers, stress_components) = (4, 11025, 3, 6). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_stress_all_ipt
field.description: OP10 / blank. Stress at all 7 through-thickness integration points (vs. only 3 layers). Unit: Pa. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_stress_all_ipt. Dimensions: (elements, integration_points, stress_components) = (11025, 7, 6). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_stress_all_ipt_thickness
field.description: OP10 / blank. Normalized through-thickness coordinate of each integration point. Unit: -. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_stress_all_ipt_thickness. Dimensions: (singleton, integration_points) = (1, 7). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_thickness
field.description: OP10 / blank. Current shell element thickness, per element, per timestep. Unit: mm. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_thickness. Dimensions: (timesteps, elements) = (4, 11025). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_unknown_variables
field.description: OP10 / blank. Additional LS-DYNA element variables (UNV1, UNV2) — solver internal. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/element_shell_unknown_variables. Dimensions: (timesteps, elements, unknown_vars) = (3, 11025, 2). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_node_acceleration
field.description: OP10 / blank. Acceleration vectors of nodes. Unit: mm/s^2. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/node_acceleration. Dimensions: (timesteps, nodes, xyz) = (3, 11236, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_node_coordinates
field.description: OP10 / blank. Initial XYZ positions of nodes. Unit: mm. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/node_coordinates. Dimensions: (nodes, xyz) = (11236, 3). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_blank_node_displacement
field.description: OP10 / blank. Displacement vectors from initial position, per node, per timestep. Unit: mm. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/node_displacement. Dimensions: (timesteps, nodes, xyz) = (4, 11236, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_blank_node_ids
field.description: OP10 / blank. Unique integer identifiers for each node point. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/node_ids. Dimensions: (nodes) = (11236). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_blank_node_velocity
field.description: OP10 / blank. Velocity vectors of nodes. Unit: mm/s. HDF5 path: OP10/blank/node_velocity. Dimensions: (timesteps, nodes, xyz) = (3, 11236, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_die_element_shell_ids
field.description: OP10 / die. Unique integer identifiers for each shell element. HDF5 path: OP10/die/element_shell_ids. Dimensions: (elements) = (2084). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_die_element_shell_node_indexes
field.description: OP10 / die. Local node indices of the 4 corners of each quadrilateral element. HDF5 path: OP10/die/element_shell_node_indexes. Dimensions: (elements, quad_corners) = (2084, 4). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_die_node_acceleration

field.name: op10_general_element_shell_node_indexes

field.name: op10_general_global_internal_energy
field.description: OP10 / general. Total internal energy of the entire system per timestep. Unit: mJ. HDF5 path: OP10/general/global_internal_energy. Dimensions: (timesteps) = (3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_general_global_kinetic_energy
field.description: OP10 / general. Total kinetic energy of the system per timestep. Unit: mJ. HDF5 path: OP10/general/global_kinetic_energy. Dimensions: (timesteps) = (3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_general_global_timesteps
field.description: OP10 / general. Simulation time at each output timestep. Unit: s. HDF5 path: OP10/general/global_timesteps. Dimensions: (timesteps) = (3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_general_global_total_energy
field.description: OP10 / general. Sum of all energy components in the system per timestep. Unit: mJ. HDF5 path: OP10/general/global_total_energy. Dimensions: (timesteps) = (3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_general_global_velocity
field.description: OP10 / general. Global system centre-of-mass velocity vector per timestep. Unit: mm/s. HDF5 path: OP10/general/global_velocity. Dimensions: (timesteps, xyz) = (3, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_general_node_ids
field.description: OP10 / general. Unique integer identifiers for each node point. HDF5 path: OP10/general/node_ids. Dimensions: (nodes) = (14533). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_general_part_hourglass_energy

field.name: op10_general_part_internal_energy
field.description: OP10 / general. Internal energy per part (die, punch, binder, blank), per timestep. Unit: mJ. HDF5 path: OP10/general/part_internal_energy. Dimensions: (timesteps, parts) = (3, 4). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_general_part_kinetic_energy
field.description: OP10 / general. Kinetic energy per part, per timestep. Unit: mJ. HDF5 path: OP10/general/part_kinetic_energy. Dimensions: (timesteps, parts) = (3, 4). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_general_part_mass
field.description: OP10 / general. Mass of each part, per timestep. Unit: kg. HDF5 path: OP10/general/part_mass. Dimensions: (timesteps, parts) = (3, 4). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

field.name: op10_general_part_material_type
field.description: OP10 / general. Field part_material_type (no curated description). HDF5 path: OP10/general/part_material_type. Dimensions: (axis0) = (4). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_general_part_titles
field.description: OP10 / general. Field part_titles (no curated description). HDF5 path: OP10/general/part_titles. Dimensions: (axis0) = (4). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_general_part_titles_ids
field.description: OP10 / general. Field part_titles_ids (no curated description). HDF5 path: OP10/general/part_titles_ids. Dimensions: (axis0) = (4). Not time-varying.

field.name: op10_general_part_velocity
field.description: OP10 / general. Field part_velocity (no curated description). HDF5 path: OP10/general/part_velocity. Dimensions: (timesteps, axis1, axis2) = (3, 4, 3). Time-varying, axis 0 indexes timesteps.

recordSet.name: simulation-provenance
recordSet.description: Dataset-wide FE simulation provenance, with field names matching the SIM-KAx schema (Schumann et al., 2026, doi:10.1007/s11740-026-01441-7) for cross-institution interoperability.

field.name: description
field.value: Deep drawing of a modified quadratic cup (210 x 210 mm, 30 mm drawing depth) from DP600 dual-phase steel.
field.description: Free-text summary of the simulation campaign.

field.name: program
field.description: Name (and version, if relevant) of the FE solver used to produce the dataset.

field.name: tool_deformability
field.description: SIM-KAx vocabulary: tool deformability mode. One of 'rigid', 'elastoplastic', 'plastic'.

field.name: tool_movement
field.description: SIM-KAx vocabulary: method used to drive the tools. One of 'kinematic', 'tabular', 'force-based', 'energy-based', 'other'.

field.name: model_symmetries
field.description: SIM-KAx vocabulary: model symmetries exploited. One of 'none', 'half model', 'quarter model', 'angular periodic'.

field.name: meshing
field.value: Fully integrated shell elements (ELFORM=16) with 7 integration points; planar regions ~10 mm edge, blank ~1 mm, finer at radii (>= 6 elements across).
field.description: Free-text summary of the mesh: element formulation, integration points, characteristic edge sizes.

field.name: element_size
field.description: Characteristic minimum finite-element edge length (mm).

field.name: contact_tolerance
field.description: Maximum gap used to detect contact between surfaces (mm). 0.0 means the LS-DYNA default is in effect.

field.name: contact_type
field.description: LS-DYNA contact card identifier governing blank-tool contact.

field.name: material_model
field.value: *MAT_125 (Kinematic Hardening Transversely Anisotropic, Yoshida-Uemori, calibrated for DP600)
field.description: Material model used for the deformable blank, including LS-DYNA keyword.

field.name: pre_stage_simulated
field.description: SIM-KAx vocabulary: True if a pre-stage (e.g. forming history) was simulated or imported before the OP10 forming step.

field.name: return_stroke_simulated
field.description: SIM-KAx vocabulary: True if the return stroke (tool retraction) is included as a representative force signal.

field.name: schema_reference
field.description: Pointer to the schema this provenance block follows (DDACS extension to SIM-KAx).

recordSet.name: springback-minimal
recordSet.description: Minimal springback view from OP10. The springback displacement is the delta: `springback - forming` (i.e. last timestep minus the one before).

field.name: op10_blank_node_displacement_forming
field.description: Blank node displacement at maximum forming depth (OP10 timestep 2).

field.name: op10_blank_node_displacement_springback
field.description: Blank node displacement after OP10 springback (timestep 3). Subtract `forming` to get the springback displacement.

recordSet.name: springback-prediction
recordSet.description: Inputs (initial tool geometries + initial blank geometry) and snapshots for springback prediction. Combine with `process-parameters` (via `index`) for the conditioning vector; target = springback - forming.

field.name: op10_blank_node_coordinates
field.description: Initial blank node coordinates.

field.name: op10_die_node_coordinates
field.description: Initial die node coordinates (rigid tool, top).

field.name: op10_punch_node_coordinates
field.description: Initial punch node coordinates (rigid tool, bottom).

field.name: op10_binder_node_coordinates
field.description: Initial binder/blank-holder node coordinates.

field.name: op10_blank_node_displacement_forming
field.description: Blank displacement at max forming depth (OP10 timestep 2).

field.name: op10_blank_node_displacement_springback
field.description: Blank displacement after springback (OP10 timestep 3). Subtract `forming` for the springback delta — common ML target.

recordSet.name: forming-snapshot
recordSet.description: Snapshot at maximum forming depth: blank node displacement and element shell thickness.

field.name: op10_blank_node_displacement
field.description: Blank node displacement at max forming depth.

field.name: op10_blank_element_shell_thickness
field.description: Element shell thickness at max forming depth.

recordSet.name: cutting-view
recordSet.description: OP20 cutting view. The cutting-induced springback is the delta: `springback - cut` (last timestep minus the one before).

field.name: op20_blank_node_displacement_cut
field.description: Blank node displacement immediately after the cut (OP20 timestep 0).

field.name: op20_blank_node_displacement_springback
field.description: Blank node displacement after cutting-induced springback (OP20 timestep 1). Subtract `cut` to get the cutting-induced springback.
